title: Rent Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rent Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Issues * African American Community Domestic Violence Issues * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Families with Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Veterans Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Sexual Assault Issues Slavic Community Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent payment assistance. Assistance is limited to available funding and is not guaranteed. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following criteria: -Be a resident of Multnomah County -Be at substantial risk of experiencing homelessness -Household income at or below 60% of area median income (AMI) Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm by appointment only Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO EVICTION PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with past due rent payments. Assistance is limited to available funding and is not guaranteed. Cannot assist individuals who have Section 8. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Individuals and families who meet all of the following requirements: -Are a resident of Multnomah County -Are at substantial risk of experiencing homelessness -Are at or below 80% of area median income (AMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm by appointment Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM
